description: Adversarial invariant for issue #66: broad semiconductors should not route through general vapor-deposition processes, while scoped semiconductor doping remains connected.

checks.reason: CVD is a general vapor-phase thin-film process with semiconductor applications, not a semiconductor-dependent technology.
ALD is a general atomic-scale thin-film method with semiconductor applications, not a semiconductor-dependent technology.
This node is scoped as semiconductor doping, so the semiconductor path should remain as a positive control.
The removed direct edge should not be reintroduced by a later migration or bulk import.
The removed direct edge should not be reintroduced by a later migration or bulk import.
FinFETs are the immediate scaling predecessor to GAA nanosheets, not a literal component prerequisite.
PowerVia/backside power and GAA/RibbonFET are co-scaling roadmap technologies, not a direct hard prerequisite pair.
The ALD node is anchored to the 1970s source-backed emergence of atomic layer epitaxy/deposition.
The roadmap node should not regress to a generated 1960 placeholder date.
The PowerVia-backed backside-power node should stay anchored to the source-backed 2023 milestone.
The High-NA EUV roadmap node should not regress to a generated 1960 placeholder date.
